---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ['piyushh62']
---

## 📄 Documentation Location
**File/Page:** [e.g., `docs/getting-started.md`, `/dashboard/builder`, API reference]
**Section:** [e.g., "Environment Variables", "API Authentication", "Deployment"]

## ❌ Current State
What is currently documented (or missing):
- [ ] Missing entirely
- [ ] Incorrect/outdated
- [ ] Unclear/confusing
- [ ] Incomplete
- [ ] Wrong code examples

## ✅ Expected Improvement
What should the documentation say or include:

## 💡 Suggested Changes
Specific suggestions for improvement:
- Add code example for...
- Clarify step about...
- Update screenshot for...
- Add troubleshooting for...

## 🔗 Related Issues/PRs
Link any related issues or pull requests.

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the latest version of the docs
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing docs issue
